Release notes

Common

What's changed

  • Breaking Set default appearance to components

Dependencies

  • Fluent Theme Package (v.13.0.0)
  • Classic Theme Package (v.13.0.0)
  • Bootstrap Theme Package (v.13.0.0)
  • Default Theme Package (v.13.0.0)
  • Material Theme Package (v.13.0.0)

New components

PromptBox Component

AI Smart Paste Component

Features and Updates

ButtonGroup

What's changed

  • Breaking Change default badge themeColor for ButtonGroup

Chat

What's changed

  • Breaking Enhanced Chat Component capabilities

Diagram

What's changed

  • Breaking Diagram Tooltips and Connection improvements

Grid

What's new

  • SmartBox tool

What's fixed

  • The Save changes and Cancel changes buttons do not appear on Grid (#8424)
  • The Save changes and Cancel changes buttons do not appear on Grids when clicking on a cell where edit is disabled (#8423)

MediaPlayer

What's fixed

  • Inaccurate MediaPlayer timeline on changing source via media method (#7060)

MultiSelect

What's fixed

  • MultiSelect with autoClose true does not clear search value when an item is selected (#8429)

Notification

What's new

  • Add closeButton support to Notification show and showText methods (#8256)

What's changed

  • Breaking Change default type of notification in show method

Scheduler

What's fixed

  • Virtual Scheduler returns wrong resources in slotTemplate (#8381)

TabStrip

What's changed

  • Breaking Remove k-item class from from k-tabstrip-item element
